## Checklist

- [ ] `py -m pytest` passes locally
- [ ] [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated under `## [Unreleased]`

      `cue4parse_cli/bin/publish/` binary is committed alongside the source

      new behaviour
- [ ] If a new dependency was added, it's pinned in `requirements.txt` and
      mentioned in the README
